## Goal

What should be visibly stronger on the public GitHub profile or NEXUS repository?

## Proof To Add

- [ ] Screenshot
- [ ] Demo video or GIF
- [ ] Test result
- [ ] Coverage result
- [ ] Performance/build result
- [ ] Release note

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The proof is linked from README or release notes
- [ ] The result is reproducible or timestamped
- [ ] The PR includes evidence in its description
